title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
description: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.

title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
description: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.

title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
description: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.

title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
description: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.

title: Position: Let's Develop Data Probes to Fundamentally Understand How Data Affects LLM Performance
description:
arXiv:2605.18801v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Data is fundamental to large language models (LLMs). However, understanding of what makes certain data useful for different stages of an LLM workflow, including training, tuning, alignment, in-context learning, etc., and why, remains an open question.

title: Operationalizing Document AI: A Microservice Architecture for OCR and LLM Pipelines in Production
description:
arXiv:2605.18818v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Academic research tends to focus on new models for document understanding creating a wide gap in the literature between model definition and running models at production scale. To close that gap, we present a microservice architecture that encapsulate

title: AgentNLQ: A General-Purpose Agent for Natural Language to SQL
description:
arXiv:2605.19010v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Natural language to SQL (NL2SQL) conversion is an important problem for researchers and enterprises due to the ubiquitous importance of relational databases in broad-ranging practical problems. Despite the rapid advancements in the capabilities of LLM

title: Embedding by Elicitation: Dynamic Representations for Bayesian Optimization of System Prompts
description:
arXiv:2605.19093v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: System prompts are a central control mechanism in modern AI systems, shaping behavior across conversations, tasks, and user populations. Yet they are difficult to tune when feedback is available only as aggregate metrics rather than per-example labels

title: DecisionBench: A Benchmark for Emergent Delegation in Long-Horizon Agentic Workflows
description:
arXiv:2605.19099v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We introduce DecisionBench, a benchmark substrate for emergent delegation in long-horizon agentic workflows. The substrate fixes a task suite (GAIA, tau-bench, BFCL multi-turn), a peer-model pool (11 models, 7 vendor families), a delegation interface

title: Further Notes on Our Recent Research on AI Delegation and Long-Horizon Reliability
description: Our recent paper, “LLMs Corrupt Your Documents When You Delegate”, has generated discussion about the reliability of AI systems in delegated workflows. We appreciate the interest in this work and want to clarify several important points about what the paper does—and does not—claim. The research a

title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
description:
For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm.

At its annual

description:

title: Codex for Everyday Work: AI Agents Beyond Coding
description:
Codex began as a tool for developers. Today, people are using it for much more: research, planning, file organization, automation, data analysis, presentations, and other everyday knowledge work.

In this OpenAI Forum conversation, Chris Nicholson of OpenAI Global Affairs speaks with Thibault Sottia

title: Now in preview: Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app.
description:
Codex is rolling out in preview in the ChatGPT mobile app on iOS and Android.

In this demo, see how you can start, steer, unblock, and review Codex work from your phone while Codex keeps running on your computer, Mac mini, devbox, or managed remote environment, with your files and project context s

title: Inside image generation’s Renaissance moment — the OpenAI Podcast Ep. 19
description:
People are generating over 1.5 billion images a week in ChatGPT. In this episode, Product lead Adele Li and researcher Kenji Hata share some of the new use cases and trends since the launch of Images 2.0. 

Together with host Andrew Mayne, they trace the progress from the early DALL-E days and dive

title: Non Sei Rimasto Indietro (Ancora): Capirai TUTTA l'AI in 29 Minuti
description: Non sei rimasto indietro sull'intelligenza artificiale. Sei solo stato lasciato senza le basi. In questo video ti spiego TUTTI i 27 concetti fondamentali dell'AI in 27 minuti — da cos'è un LLM, ai token, alle allucinazioni, fino agli agenti AI e all'MCP. Niente tecnichese, niente fuffa: solo il mode

title: Il Growth Hack più Oscuro della Storia dell’IA
